headline: Roth Capital Downgrades Diamondback Energy (FANG) Stock to Neutral from Buy
summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is one of the Best Long Term Growth Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 8, Roth Capital analyst Leo Mariani downgraded the company’s stock to “Neutral” from “Buy” with a price objective of $200, an increase from the previous target of $180.
